pages.title: Space Defense Idle
pages.description:
Build and command turrets to defend your space station from waves of alien attackers, managing limited resources to optimize your defenses. The game centers on strategic placement and idle progression, where players unlock stronger weapons and upgrades between assaults. Survive increasingly difficult enemy swarms while balancing automated turret upgrades to hold your ground in the cosmic setting.

Key Features

• Turret placement strategy  
• Resource management controls  
• Progressive enemy wave difficulty  
• Automated upgrade system  
• Space-themed defense layout

pages.title: Arcanoid Space Defense
pages.description:
Bounce the paddle to break through layers of colorful bricks while defending against incoming space threats. Players control a reflective barrier to ricochet a ball that destroys blocks and fend off alien obstacles. The game challenges players to clear levels by precision aiming and timing in a cosmic environment, advancing through increasing difficulty with unique enemy types.

Key Features

• Reflective paddle ball mechanic  
• Brick breaking progression system  
• Alien obstacle defense challenges  
• Precision aiming controls  
• Space-themed block layouts

pages.title: Archer Master Castle Defense 3D
pages.description:
Defend your castle by expertly aiming and firing arrows at waves of advancing enemies in this three-dimensional archery defense game. Players manage precision shooting and strategic target prioritization to hold off attackers before they breach the walls. The gameplay challenges include timing shots and upgrading defenses to withstand increasingly tough enemy units as you progress through multiple levels.

Key Features

• Precision archery targeting system  
• Player-controlled aiming and shooting  
• Progressive enemy wave difficulty  
• Upgradeable defense structures  
• 3D castle siege environment

pages.title: World Z Defense - Zombie Defense

Survive each stage by optimizing your defenses and adapting to increasing enemy numbers.
